metadata.description: Dbinky's skill set for Claude Code

plugins.name: pr-review
plugins.description: Multi-persona PR review pipeline with language and framework-specific rules. Sequential review by Architect, 10x Engineer, Security Expert, and Engineering Manager with interactive fix selection.

plugins.name: plan-to-ralph
plugins.description: Interactive Q&A to generate ralph-o-matic loop files (RALPH.md, focus-areas.md, gaps-identified.md) customized for your project.
